warnings: Do NOT press and hold any device button for 10 seconds — this erases device setup.
Multiple installers should not associate EcoSource+ and EcoAirs at the same time to avoid cross-association.
Ensure coordinator is set to correct CHANNEL and PAN before joining first device. Changing PAN or Channel after first device joins is NOT possible.
Do not press recessed buttons too quickly. Each press should be deliberate and last a full second.

steps: After plugging CAT5 or power cable into NT8000 Gateway Coordinator wait 4 minutes to fully enable join mode.
Press the Gateway button 3 times.
The Telkonet logo blinks continuously — Gateway is now in Join Mode for 15 minutes.
If logged into device via WiFi a joining countdown will appear.
To disable Join Mode early press the Gateway button 3 times again.
Using a paperclip or pen press and hold the recessed button on the front of the EcoConnect for 7 seconds then release.
LED on the front changes to rapid blinking GREEN confirming Join Mode.
To disable Join Mode press the recessed button one time.

join_options.option_a: Join through coordinator — enable Join Mode on coordinator then join each device.
join_options.option_b: Join through a thermostat already on the network acting as broker. On EcoAir or EcoInsight+ press Left 5 times then Right 5 times. Thermostat acts as broker between coordinator and new device.

join_to_gateway: Ensure coordinator Join Mode is enabled.
On the EcoInsight+ press the 2 soft buttons located in the lower middle of the faceplate: Left, Left, Right, Right.
Verify 2 bars appear above room temperature — EcoInsight+ is requesting to join.
Wait up to 60 seconds for bars to disappear.
Verify zero bars show above room temperature — EcoInsight+ has joined the network.
leave_network: Press and hold Fan button for 10 seconds then release.
Press On/Off. Maintenance menu appears on right of screen.
Arrow down to Mesh option and press On/Off. '58' will appear.
Press Down arrow to navigate to '86'. 'Leave' will show in upper left corner.
Press On/Off again. '00' will appear at bottom.
Press Up button once. '00' changes to '01'.
Press On/Off. Thermostat clicks and screen goes blank — it has left the network.
clear_da_table: Press and hold Fan button for 10 seconds then release.
Use Up/Down arrows to navigate to 'Erase'.
Press On/Off again. '00' appears indicating zero devices in DA table.

join_to_gateway: Ensure coordinator Join Mode is enabled.
Using a paperclip or pen press the recessed button on the front of EcoSource+ 5 times.
LED blinks RED RED GREEN — EcoSource+ is requesting to join.
LED blinks fast GREEN for approx 10 seconds indicating EcoSource+ has joined the network.
leave_network_below_3_4_1: Press and hold recessed button for at least 10 seconds until LED turns from RED to GREEN.
Release. Light will turn off then on confirming it has left the network.
leave_network_3_4_1_and_higher: Light will turn off then on confirming it has left the network.
clear_da_table: Press and hold recessed button for 10 seconds then release. Light blinks red and green rapidly.
Press the recessed button 10 times. DA table is now cleared.

join_to_gateway: Ensure coordinator Join Mode is enabled.
On the VRF Controller press the Join/Pair button 5 times.
LED blinks red, red, green then blinks rapid green to indicate success.
clear_da_table: Press and hold recessed button for 10 seconds then release. Light blinks red and green rapidly.
Press the recessed button 10 times. DA table is now cleared.

join_to_EcoInsight+: EcoInsight+ must already be joined to the network.
On EcoInsight+ quickly press Left soft button 4 times then Right soft button 4 times. EcoInsight+ enters Learn Mode.
Using extractor or paperclip press the EcoContact+ Join/Bind button 4 times.
LED blinks slowly while searching for network then turns off for a few seconds.
LED flashes 4 times and you hear 4 beeps — EcoContact+ has joined and bound to thermostat.
Press EcoContact+ Join/Bind button 8 times. LED blinks twice.
Touch correct sensor target to correct magnet target. You will hear beeps for one minute.
Keep magnets at least 8 inches away from sensor for 60 seconds until sensor stops searching.
join_to_EcoSource+: EcoSource+ must already be joined to the network.
Using paperclip press EcoSource+ recessed button above LED 7 times. LED flashes RED RED GREEN.
Using extractor or paperclip press the EcoContact+ Join/Bind button 4 times.
LED blinks slowly while searching then turns off for a few seconds.
LED flashes 4 times and you hear 4 beeps — EcoContact+ has joined and bound.
Press EcoContact+ Join/Bind button 8 times. LED blinks twice.
Touch correct sensor target to correct magnet target. Beeps for one minute.
Keep magnets at least 8 inches away for 60 seconds.
join_to_VRF_Controller: VRF Controller must already be joined to the network.
On the EcoSource VRF Controller press Join/Pair button 1 time. LED lights solid RED.
Using extractor or paperclip press EcoContact+ Join/Bind button 4 times.
LED blinks slowly while searching then turns off.
LED flashes 4 times and you hear 4 beeps confirming join.
Press EcoContact+ Join/Bind button 8 times. LED blinks twice.
Touch sensor target to magnet target. Beeps for one minute.
Keep magnets 8 inches away for 60 seconds.
leave_network: Press recessed Join/Bind button 12 times. Device presents 1 long light then reboots.

test_connectivity.1_long_beep: Not paired or joined to anything
test_connectivity.4_beeps: Joined to coordinator and paired to thermostat

join_to_EcoInsight+: EcoInsight+ must already be joined to the network.
On EcoInsight+ press Left soft button 4 times then Right soft button 4 times.
Press the EcoSense+ Join/Bind tab 4 times.
Light sensor blinks slowly while searching then turns off for a few seconds.
Light sensor flashes 4 times confirming EcoSense+ has joined and bound to thermostat.
join_to_EcoSource+: EcoSource+ must already be joined to the network.
Using paperclip press EcoSource+ recessed button above LED 7 times. LED flashes RED RED GREEN.
Press the EcoSense+ Join/Bind tab 4 times.
Light sensor blinks slowly while searching then turns off.
Light sensor flashes 4 times confirming join.
join_to_VRF_Controller: VRF Controller must already be joined to the network.
On EcoSource VRF Controller press Join/Pair button 1 time. LED lights solid RED.
Light sensor blinks slowly while searching.
Light sensor flashes 4 times confirming join.
leave_network: Press button 12 times. Device presents 1 long light then reboots.

test_connectivity.1_long_beep: Not paired or joined to anything
test_connectivity.4_beeps: Joined to coordinator and paired to thermostat

join_to_EcoInsight+: EcoInsight+ must already be joined to the network.
On EcoInsight+ press and hold Fan button for 10 seconds then release and press On/Off once. Maintenance menu appears on right of screen.
Press Up button once then press On/Off. Large '01' appears with small 'ADV Prog' at bottom.
Press Up button until you see small '47' at bottom then press On/Off once. '00' appears to right of '47'. You are now in Join Mode.
On the EcoSwitch+ tap the rocker switch (side closest to LED) 10 times.
EcoSwitch+ LED toggles on and off twice indicating successful join.
Note: Check DA table to verify JASCO device is in DA table.
Reboot or power cycle thermostat.
join_to_EcoSource+: EcoSource+ must already be joined to the network.
Using paperclip press EcoSource+ recessed button above LED 15 times. EcoSource+ flashes RED RED GREEN.
On EcoSwitch+ tap the rocker switch (side closest to LED) 10 times.
EcoSwitch+ LED toggles on and off twice indicating successful join.
join_to_VRF_Controller: Ensure coordinator Join Mode is enabled.
LED on VRF Controller lights solid RED.
On EcoSwitch+ tap the rocker switch (side closest to LED) 10 times.
LED toggles on and off twice indicating successful join.
remove_from_network: Ensure no thermostats or Gateways are in join mode.
Quickly press the top part of the rocker switch (side furthest from LED) 10 times.
Warning: EcoSwitch+ will attempt to rejoin immediately so no thermostats or Gateways should be in join mode.

join_to_network: Ensure coordinator Join Mode is enabled.
On the EcoSwitch press and hold the toggle switch until RED LED blinks rapidly (approx 10 seconds). Release.
LED slowly flashes GREEN while searching for network.
LED changes to quick GREEN flash signifying join was successful.
bind_to_EcoInsight+: On EcoInsight+ quickly press Left soft button 4 times then Right soft button 4 times. EcoInsight+ enters Learn Mode.
On the EcoSwitch press and hold toggle switch until GREEN LED blinks slowly 2 times then release.
In ESU refresh the Devices Sensors table. 'LSW' will now appear.
bind_to_EcoSource+: Using paperclip press EcoSource+ recessed button above LED 6 times. LED flashes RED RED GREEN.
On EcoSwitch press and hold toggle switch until GREEN LED blinks slowly 2 times then release.
In ESU refresh Devices Sensors table. 'LSW' will now appear.
bind_to_VRF_Controller: On EcoSource VRF Controller press Join/Pair button 6 times. LED lights solid RED.
On EcoSwitch press and hold toggle switch until GREEN LED blinks slowly 2 times then release.
In ESU refresh Devices Sensors table. 'LSW' will now appear.
leave_network: Press and hold toggle switch for at least 10 seconds until GREEN LED blinks quickly. Release.
Press and hold toggle switch again for at least 10 seconds until GREEN LED blinks quickly. Release.
Solid red light for 3 seconds confirms it has left the network.

join_to_network: Ensure coordinator Join Mode is enabled.
Using paperclip press and hold EcoGuard recessed Join/Bind button until top LED blinks RED rapidly (about 10 seconds).
Release. Top LED slowly flashes GREEN while searching for network.
Top LED changes to quick GREEN flash signifying join was successful.
Ensure top and bottom LEDs are lit (both outlets have power). Press Join/Bind button repeatedly if needed until both LEDs are lit.
bind_to_EcoInsight+: On EcoInsight+ quickly press Left soft button 4 times then Right soft button 4 times. EcoInsight+ enters Learn Mode.
Using paperclip press and hold EcoGuard Join/Bind button until GREEN LED blinks slowly 2 times then release.
In ESU refresh the Devices Sensors table. 'LCM' will now display.
bind_to_EcoSource+: Using paperclip press EcoSource+ recessed button 6 times. LED flashes RED RED GREEN.
Using paperclip press and hold EcoGuard Join/Bind button until GREEN LED blinks slowly 2 times then release.
In ESU refresh Devices Sensors table. 'LCM' will now display.
bind_to_VRF_Controller: On EcoSource VRF Controller press Join/Pair button 6 times. LED lights solid RED.
Using paperclip press and hold EcoGuard Join/Bind button until GREEN LED blinks slowly 2 times then release.
In ESU refresh Devices Sensors table. 'LCM' will now display.
leave_network: Press recessed bind button for at least 10 seconds until GREEN LED blinks quickly then release.
LED displays solid red for 2-3 seconds. EcoGuard reboots confirming it has left the network.

pair_to_EcoSource+: Use paperclip or pen to press EcoSource+ recessed button above LED light once. Solid RED LED will appear.
On EcoAir-HS press and hold On/Off button until Maintenance menu appears then continue holding until 2 large digits appear on screen (last 2 digits of MAC address). Release.
pair_to_VRF_Controller: On EcoSource VRF Controller press Join/Pair button 1 time. LED lights solid RED.
On EcoAir-HS press and hold Fan button until 2 large digits appear on screen.

pair_to_EcoSource+: Use paperclip or pen to press EcoSource+ recessed button above LED 7 times. LED blinks RED RED GREEN.
On EcoTouch+ perform a three-finger tap anywhere on screen.
Touch Config. Enter password C57A. Touch Enter.
When screen shows 'Success!' press Back, Back, Back.
pair_to_VRF_Controller: Use paperclip or pen to press EcoSmart VRF Controller recessed button 7 times. LED blinks RED RED GREEN.
On EcoTouch+ perform a three-finger tap anywhere on screen.
Touch Config. Enter password C57A. Touch Enter.
When screen shows 'Success!' press Back, Back, Back.
unpair: On EcoTouch+ three-finger tap anywhere on screen.
Touch Config. Enter password C57A. Touch Enter.
When 'No longer Paired' appears touch Exit, Exit, Exit.

shared_occupancy.description: When a space has two thermostats and one detects occupancy for both — configure shared occupancy.
steps: Join all devices in the space to the network.
Designate Thermostat A as the one sharing its occupancy status.
Connect Thermostat B to laptop via dedicated serial cable and open ESU.
Navigate to Devices/Sensors tab. Thermostat B should be on Slot 0 with Bind Type 0.
In the Cmd field enter: da -i 1 -m 0x[MAC of Thermostat A] -b 3 then press Enter.
Plug into Thermostat A.
If Thermostat A is EcoInsight+ enter: sw -o 1 in Cmd field.
If Thermostat A is EcoSource+ enter: sw -o 2 in Cmd field.
Navigate to Devices/Sensors tab in ESU. Slot 1 now contains MAC of Thermostat B with Bind Type 3.
Close ESU and disconnect cable. Shared occupancy is now configured.

multi_bind_ecotouch.description: When a suite has two EcoTouch+ devices they must mirror each other via multi-bind.
steps: Press Gateway button 3 times to enable Join Mode for 15 minutes.
Join EcoSource+ A to network by pressing its button 5 times.
Join EcoSource+ B to network by pressing its button 5 times.
Ensure Gateway Join Mode is disabled (logo not flashing).
Connect EcoSource+ A to ESU and enter: $jn -t 200 and $zb -B. Or press EcoSource+ A button 7 times.
On EcoTouch+ A: three-finger tap, Config, password C57a, Pair, Search. When Success press Back 3 times.
Verify EcoTouch+ A shows EcoSource+ A MAC as Parent in System Status.
Repeat for EcoTouch+ B paired to EcoSource+ B.
Multi-bind EcoTouch+ B to EcoSource+ A: connect EcoSource+ A to ESU and enter $zb -B. On EcoTouch+ B three-finger tap, Config, C57a, Pair, Search.
Repeat multi-bind for EcoTouch+ A to EcoSource+ B.
Verify by changing setpoint on EcoTouch+ A and confirming EcoTouch+ B shows same setpoint.

multi_bind_ecoair.description: One EcoAir communicates with multiple EcoSource+ devices. One is Master, others are Minions.
push_button_steps: Determine which EcoSource+ will be Master.
Press Master EcoSource+ button twice. LED blinks red.
Hold EcoAir On/Off button until EcoAir displays 2 digits on screen (up to 10 seconds).
Verify Master EcoSource+ LED changed from blinking red to blinking green.
Remove 2 AA batteries from EcoAir. Wait 15 seconds. Reinsert batteries.
Press Minion EcoSource+ button 3 times. LED blinks red.
Hold EcoAir On/Off button until EcoAir displays 2 digits on screen.
Verify Minion EcoSource+ LED changed from blinking red to blinking green.
Return power to each Minion EcoSource+.

third_party_door_locks.note: Integration guides for door locks are found in Telkonet Partner Portal under Guides > I, O and M Guides > Installation Operation and Maintenance Guides.
